summary: Life Timeline feature testing completed. Backend API (15/15 tests PASS) is fully functional. Frontend TimelineProfileContent component in MojoProfileModal.jsx correctly integrates with the API. However, the Pet Soul Journey page (/pet/{pet_id}) uses a different 'Milestone Timeline' component from PetMilestoneTimeline.jsx which connects to engagement/milestones API, not the life-timeline API.

minor.issue: DELETE returns 200 even when event doesn't exist (idempotent behavior, not a bug)

integration_issues.flow: Life Timeline display on Pet Soul Journey page
integration_issues.issue: The Pet Soul Journey page (/pet/{pet_id}) uses PetMilestoneTimeline component which connects to /api/engagement/milestones/{petId} instead of the Life Timeline API. The Life Timeline section in MojoProfileModal.jsx (TimelineProfileContent) correctly uses /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/life-timeline but is accessed via the accordion sections in the modal.

action_items: Consider integrating Life Timeline API data into PetMilestoneTimeline component or provide clear navigation path to MOJO Profile Modal's Life Timeline section
The 'Mira Memories' tab shows 'Milestone Timeline' with 0 moments - may need to fetch from life-timeline API or auto-detect from soul_answers data
critical_code_review_comments: Backend Life Timeline API at server.py:11433 is well-implemented - aggregates events from multiple sources (birthday, adoption, orders, tickets, health data)
TimelineProfileContent component in MojoProfileModal.jsx correctly fetches from /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/life-timeline
Two separate timeline systems exist: 1) Engagement Milestones (gamification) 2) Life Timeline (life events) - may cause user confusion
PetMilestoneTimeline.jsx has 'Auto-detect' feature but uses engagement/milestones API, not life-timeline API

success_rate.frontend: Partial - API integration exists in MojoProfileModal but Pet Soul Journey page uses different component

seed_data_creation: Lola's profile already has timeline data: adoption_date, last_vet_visit, last_grooming_date
context_for_next_testing_agent: Life Timeline backend API is fully functional and returns aggregated events (verified with curl and pytest). The TimelineProfileContent component in MojoProfileModal.jsx correctly integrates with the API. The Pet Soul Journey page (/pet/{pet_id}) shows 'Milestone Timeline' under 'Mira Memories' tab which uses a different API (/api/engagement/milestones). To see the Life Timeline data, access the MOJO Profile Modal and expand the 'Life Timeline' accordion section.

GET /api/pet-soul/profile/pet-e6348b13c9.response: Returns 4 events: grooming (2026-01-25), vet visit (2025-11-10), vaccination (2025-06-15), adoption (2020-08-20)

POST /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/time.tested: Successfully added and retrieved manual timeline event
